name: professional-design-system
description: Accessible HTML + Tailwind CSS primitive component library, built on ratified semantic design tokens.

scripts.prebuild: npm run audit:tokens && npm run audit:contrast
scripts.pretest:e2e: npm run build --workspace packages/react && npm run audit:tokens && npm run audit:contrast
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run audit:tokens && npm run audit:contrast && npm run build && npm run test:e2e
